label: Cited Data
description: Data explicitly stated or cited in the original study text.

label: Qualitative Assessment
description: Qualitative judgment or opinion expressed by the author.

label: Internal Research
description: Based on the author's or organization's internal research and benchmarking.

label: Inferred
description: Value inferred by the archivist from context in the original text.

label: Retrospective
description: Outcome or status determined retrospectively at time of archival ingest.

label: Market Data
description: Quantitative or qualitative market information.

label: Market Trend
description: Directional market movement or adoption pattern.

label: Procurement Behavior
description: Organizational purchasing decisions or patterns.

label: Benchmark
description: Technical performance measurement or specification.

label: Performance Assessment
description: Subjective or qualitative evaluation of system performance.

label: Workload Measurement
description: Measured resource consumption or utilization.

label: Planning Parameter
description: Organizational planning assumption or target.

label: Viability Prediction
description: Forward-looking assessment of technology or market viability.

label: Actual Outcome
description: Retrospectively determined result compared to predictions or state at study time.

label: Recommendation
description: Author's explicit recommendation for action.

label: Specification
description: Industry specification or standard.

label: Resource Demand
description: Assessment of computing resource consumption trends.

label: Workload Inventory
description: Enumeration of software or services running on a system.

label: Research Firm
description: Technology research and advisory firm.

label: Corporation
description: Commercial business entity.

label: Person
description: Individual contributor or author.

label: Corporate Cohort
description: Named group of companies used as reference class.

label: Active
description: Entity is currently operating.

label: Acquired
description: Entity was acquired by another organization.

label: Unknown
description: Current status of entity is not determined.

label: Current Generation
description: Technology was current/new at the time of the study.

label: Previous Generation
description: Technology was one generation behind at study time.

label: Pre-release
description: Technology was announced but not yet released at study time.

label: Mature
description: Technology was well-established and widely deployed at study time.

label: Legacy
description: Technology was outdated but still in some use at study time.

label: Obsolete
description: Technology is no longer in meaningful use.

label: Active
description: Technology remains in active use or production.

label: High Confidence
description: Data point is explicitly stated or well-established.

label: Medium Confidence
description: Data point is reasonably supported but involves some interpretation.

label: Low Confidence
description: Data point involves significant interpretation or uncertainty.
